ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Coding system for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., drug, device) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer producing the product */,
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dosage form associated with the product */,
  "therapeutic_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapeutic area related to the product */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved by regulatory authorities */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the product expires */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for tracking specific batches of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_therapeutic_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapeutic_area_id") REFERENCES therapeutic_areas ("therapeutic_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_dosage_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("dosage_form_id") REFERENCES dosage_forms ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_forms" (
  "dosage_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "dosage_form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form (e.g., tablet, capsule) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosage form */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route through which the dosage form is administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapeutic_areas" (
  "therapeutic_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapeutic area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapeutic area (e.g., gastroenterology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapeutic area */,
  "indications" TEXT /* Conditions or diseases that the therapeutic area addresses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapeutic_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "active_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the active ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the active ingredient */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the active ingredient */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS (Chemical Abstracts Service) number for the active ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ingredients" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the active ingredient */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the active ingredient in the product */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the active ingredient in the product */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the compliance */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit for compliance */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled audit */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price became effective */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the price (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user recommends the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, pharmacist, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change made to the product information */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
